{{Quote|It seemed like a simple enough mission, but when we saw the fleet of droid ships, hovering over the planet, we suddenly realized that Delso's denial mechanisms were more dangerous than we'd imagined.|Anonymous 501st clone trooper|<ref name="BFII" />|audio=GizorDellso3.flac}}
This '''[[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]''' was the navy of [[Gizor Dellso]], a rogue [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] who attempted to restart the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
The fleet consisted of [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ships]], [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyers]], [[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|''Munificent''-class star frigates]], [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]], [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|Droid tri-fighters]], [[Belbullab-24 strike bomber]]s, and at least one [[HMP droid gunship/Legends|Heavy Missile Platform]].<ref name="BFII" />

==History==
{{Quote|The slight whiff of nostalgia the 501st had enjoyed fighting the droid fleet over Mustafar had already grown sour by the time we'd established oribital positions. Now it was time to find out what this was all about.|Anonymous 501st clone trooper|<ref name="BFII" />}}
After the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|brought]] to an end by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Gizor Dellso]], a [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] who was determined to continue the fight, traveled to [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. There he managed to locate and reactivate a secret [[Techno Union droid factory/Legends|droid factory]], which he used to produce an [[Gizor Dellso's army|army of battle droids]] and a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Dellso sent the fleet to [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] Mustafar, to prevent any attacks of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Between [[17 BBY/Legends|17]] and [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], Vader became aware of Dellso's efforts to restart the Clone Wars, and sent the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]], the elite [[unit]] of the Empire, to eliminate Dellso and his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] army. Dellso's fleet engaged the Legion in space above Mustafar, where it was destroyed, and the factory was subsequently destroyed by the Empire.<ref name="BFII" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
